title: Urban flood risk and resilience assessment
summary: Land cover and flood data support city-scale flood-damage modelling and resilience planning.
problem: Urban flooding causes growing damage as climate change intensifies rainfall and impervious surfaces expand. Cities need to model flood scenarios and quantify potential damage to prioritise resilience investment.
solution: CLMS Urban Atlas land-use classes combined with CEMS flood mapping enable city-scale flood-damage modelling, attributing monetary damage by land-use class and building stock. Planners can compare scenarios and target flood-resilience measures cost-effectively.

copernicusRole.detail: CLMS Urban Atlas land-use classes are combined with CEMS flood layers in a damage model that attributes monetary loss by class. Copernicus provides inputs to a scenario model.
